case_title: YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. VS ROCKWELL, BURTON L.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROCKWELL, BURTON L. $4,158.74 PRINCIPAL, $109.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,267.74 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR NOTICE OF INTENTION TO ISSUE AMENDED AND CORRECTED JUDGMENT AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SET FOR MAY-28-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ROCKWELL, BURTON L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY-28-2010 - AMENDED JUDGMENT ISSUED. MR. WEINER PRESENT ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF, NO APPEARANCE BY OTHER PARTY. JUDGE JAMES J. MCBRIDE, CLERK SHAWNA VANTREE, REPORTER RITA HOWELL (206).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROCKWELL, BURTON L.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROCKWELL, BURTON L. $4,158.74 PRINCIPAL, $159.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,317.74, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $5544.99; AND ATTRIBUTES 25% COMPARATIVE NEGLIGENCE TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ROCKWELL, BURTON L.
ORDER FOR AMENDED JUDGMENT RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY 28, 2010
